title: Tabular Review Tool
state: Implementing the table manipulation branch into AssistMax repository.
nextAction: Implement Status Indicator and Error Handling
summary:
Tabular Review is a shared table workspace that enhances bulk document extraction. It processes large sets of documents to extract structured data at scale, converting it into a live, editable table with citations linked to the original source text. Users can access this table through chat or a dedicated interface, where they can refine inputs, rerun extractions, and manipulate the table.

This tool transforms extraction from a one-time output into a continuous working surface. Users can reshape, validate, and collaborate on data in real time, enabling the transition from casual exploration in chat to deliberate, repeatable workflows. Without this layer, the tool would be just another extraction endpoint. With it, legal professionals can effectively analyze, compare, and manage information together.
